# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

function generateAdminReport($pdo) {
    $reports = [];
    $whereClauses = [];
    $params = [];

    // Base query
    $sql = "SELECT id, user_id, status, category, amount, created_at, description FROM reports";

    // 1. Date Range Filter
    if (!empty($_POST['start_date']) && !empty($_POST['end_date'])) {
        $whereClauses[] = "created_at BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date";
        $params[':start_date'] = $_POST['start_date'] . ' 00:00:00'; // Start of the day
        $params[':end_date'] = $_POST['end_date'] . ' 23:59:59';   // End of the day
    }

    // 2. Status Filter
    if (!empty($_POST['status']) && $_POST['status'] !== 'all') {
        $whereClauses[] = "status = :status";
        $params[':status'] = $_POST['status'];
    }

    // 3. Category Filter
    if (!empty($_POST['category']) && $_POST['category'] !== 'all') {
        $whereClauses[] = "category = :category";
        $params[':category'] = $_POST['category'];
    }

    // Construct the WHERE clause
    if (!empty($whereClauses)) {
        $sql .= " WHERE " . implode(" AND ", $whereClauses);
    }

    // Add ordering for better report presentation
    $sql .= " ORDER BY created_at DESC";

    try {
        $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);

        // Bind parameters
        foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value);
        }

        $stmt->execute();
        $reports = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    } catch (PDOException $e) {
        // In a real application, log the error and display a user-friendly message
        error_log("Report generation error: " . $e->getMessage());
        return ['error' => 'Failed to generate report. Please try again.'];
    }

    return $reports;
}

// Example usage:
/*
// -----------------------------------------------------------
// Database Connection Setup (replace with your actual credentials)
// -----------------------------------------------------------
$dbHost = 'localhost';
$dbName = 'your_database_name';
$dbUser = 'your_username';
$dbPass = 'your_password';

try {
    $pdo = new PDO("mysql:host=$dbHost;dbname=$dbName;charset=utf8mb4", $dbUser, $dbPass, [
        PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE => PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION,
        PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE => PDO::FETCH_ASSOC,
        PDO::ATTR_EMULATE_PREPARES => false,
    ]);
} catch (PDOException $e) {
    die("Database connection failed: " . $e->getMessage());
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------
// Simulating $_POST data for demonstration
// In a real application, this would come from a form submission
// -----------------------------------------------------------

// Scenario 1: No filters (will fetch all reports)
// $_POST = [];

// Scenario 2: Date range only
// $_POST = [
//     'start_date' => '2023-01-01',
//     'end_date' => '2023-01-31',
// ];

// Scenario 3: Status filter only
// $_POST = [
//     'status' => 'pending',
// ];

// Scenario 4: Category filter only
// $_POST = [
//     'category' => 'sales',
// ];

// Scenario 5: Date range and status
// $_POST = [
//     'start_date' => '2023-01-01',
//     'end_date' => '2023-03-31',
//     'status' => 'completed',
// ];

// Scenario 6: All filters
$_POST = [
    'start_date' => '2023-01-01',
    'end_date' => '2023-12-31',
    'status' => 'processing',
    'category' => 'support',
];

// Call the function to generate the report
$reportData = generateAdminReport($pdo);

// -----------------------------------------------------------
// Displaying the report (for demonstration purposes)
// -----------------------------------------------------------
if (isset($reportData['error'])) {
    echo "Error: " . $reportData['error'];
} else {
    echo "<h2>Generated Report</h2>";
    if (empty($reportData)) {
        echo "<p>No reports found matching the criteria.</p>";
    } else {
        echo "<table border='1' cellpadding='5' cellspacing='0'>";
        echo "<thead><tr><th>ID</th><th>User ID</th><th>Status</th><th>Category</th><th>Amount</th><th>Created At</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead>";
        echo "<tbody>";
        foreach ($reportData as $row) {
            echo "<tr>";
            echo "<td>" . htmlspecialchars($row['id']) . "</td>";
            echo "<td>" . htmlspecialchars($row['user_id']) . "</td>";
            echo "<td>" . htmlspecialchars($row['status']) . "</td>";
            echo "<td>" . htmlspecialchars($row['category']) . "</td>";
            echo "<td>" . htmlspecialchars($row['amount']) . "</td>";
            echo "<td>" . htmlspecialchars($row['created_at']) . "</td>";
            echo "<td>" . htmlspecialchars($row['description']) . "</td>";
            echo "</tr>";
        }
        echo "</tbody>";
        echo "</table>";
    }
}
*/
?>
